name: Zucchini-Curry Eintopf (Zucchini Curry Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 100g dried grated coconut with water in the microwave oven, puree it and strain it through a sieve.
2. Peel, seed and dice zucchini.
3. Mince onion and garlic.
4. Puree tomatoes together with the juice.
5. Steam onion and garlic in the clarified butter.
6. Stir in curry powder.
7. Add tomato puree and cook until it thickens slightly.
8. Dissolve coconut paste in the tomato puree.
9. Add diced zucchini and steam for about 30 minutes until tender.
10. Roast mustard seeds in a pan and sprinkle over the stew.
